definition: The 2s5s10s butterfly spread at -15 to -25bp (vs -5bp historical average, 2-4 standard deviations from post-2010 mean) is a direct artifact of basis trade concentration ($800B-$1T at 50-100x leverage) pinning the 5Y belly, creating funding-liquidity vulnerability that would normalize violently if basis trades unwind.
evidence: Four agents independently converge on mechanism and historical precedent
2006-07 analogue and March 2020 mini-episode producing 30bp+ move in 3 days
Anomaly at 2-4 standard deviations from post-2010 average is directly observable
Policy path anchoring at 5Y vs term premium explosion at 10Y vs basis trade distortion
Scale difference ($800B-$1T vs $200-300B in 2006) makes this genuinely unprecedented territory
open_questions: What is the precise MOVE level that triggers basis trade margin calls (identified as 'single most important gap')?
Is the appropriate normalization magnitude 20-40bp or 40-60bp?
Does the nonlinear system invalidate linear scaling from the 2006 analogue?
